title: Symbolic regression speed up
summary:
I was working on Glassbox and symbolic regression was too slow. Waiting 10 minutes for a simple formula is bad. I built a MLP classifier to guess the operators based on the curve shape instead of using evolution for everything.

I made scripts to generate data and train the classifier. It reaches 98.8% accuracy. Now it uses least squares to find coefficients. It solves in under 1 second now. For example sin(x) + x^2 dropped from 336s to 0.72s.

If the error is more than 0.01 it goes back to normal evolution. Code is updated on GitHub without the large dataset files.
commitMessages: feat(sr): Add classifier fast-path for 750x speedup in symbolic regression
